title: betonica alopecuros var. divulsa
intro: Bentonica alopecuros var. divulsa, also known as Mountain St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and depression, improving sleep quality, and aiding in wound healing. Bentonica alopecuros var. divulsa is often used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health problems.
